stemHtml: If the Centre of Gravity of an aeroplane moves forward during flight, the elevator control will become:

options.a: heavier making the aeroplane more difficult to manoeuvre in pitch.
options.b: lighter making the aeroplane more difficult to manoeuvre in pitch.
options.c: lighter making the aeroplane more easy to manoeuvre in pitch.
options.d: heavier making the aeroplane more easy to manoeuvre in pitch.
